tiers.name: Community Entry
tiers.purpose: Top-of-funnel adoption, trust, and ecosystem credibility.
tiers.conversion_goal: Convert activated builders into qualified opportunities

tiers.name: Design-Partner Pilot
tiers.purpose: Validate use case, collect product feedback, and prove business ROI.
tiers.conversion_goal: Convert validated pilots into annual contracts

tiers.name: Production Annual Contract
tiers.purpose: Turn validated pilot workflows into repeatable annual revenue.
tiers.conversion_goal: Drive renewal, expansion, and referenceable logos

notes: Pricing ranges are assumptions for planning and should be validated per segment.
Enterprise agreements may include security and compliance add-ons.
